aiDescription.en: A 1-bedroom, 1-bathroom unit of 450 sqft on Jalan Sultan Ismail in the Chow Kit commercial district. The compact layout suits a single adult or couple without children. Queen's College is within a short walk, and additional schools including President College are nearby. A clinic is within a short drive. Multiple convenience stores are within a short walk, and an extensive range of dining options surrounds the building. The area is well-served by public transport. Partial furnishing provides basic fixtures. No dedicated car park is included.
aiDescription.my: Unit 1 bilik tidur, 1 bilik air seluas 450 kaki persegi di Jalan Sultan Ismail dalam daerah komersial Chow Kit. Susun atur padat sesuai untuk seorang dewasa atau pasangan tanpa anak. Queen's College dalam jarak berjalan pendek, dan sekolah tambahan termasuk President College berhampiran. Klinik dalam pandu singkat. Pelbagai kedai serbaguna dalam jarak berjalan pendek, dan pelbagai pilihan makan mengekelilingi bangunan. Kawasan ini dilayani dengan baik oleh pengangkutan awam. Perabot separa menyediakan kelengkapan asas. Tiada tempat letak kereta khusus.
aiDescription.cn: 位于吉隆坡秋杰路商业区的1卧室1浴室单位，面积450平方英尺。紧凑布局适合单身成年人或无子女夫妻。皇后学院在短距离步行范围内，另有总统学院等其他学校在附近。诊所需短途车程。多家便利店在步行范围内，餐饮选择丰富。公共交通便利。半配套装修提供基本设施。无专属停车位。

aiDescription.en: This 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom unit in Bennington Residences, Setapak, is situated in a well-established residential neighbourhood with 24-hour security. The unfurnished layout provides a blank canvas for families to personalise their living space according to their needs and preferences. Two covered parking spaces are included, accommodating family vehicle requirements. SK Mariam Convent and Pusat Tuisyen Harapan Baru are among the educational options in the surrounding area, serving primary and secondary school-age children. Multiple clinics and pharmacies operate nearby, including Klinik Dan Surgeri Setapak and CARiNG Pharmacy Prima Setapak, providing accessible healthcare. Daily necessities are met through convenience stores such as 7-Eleven and KK Super Mart within the neighbourhood. A mosque is available within the vicinity for religious observance. The Setapak area offers a range of dining options from quick-service restaurants to local eateries.
aiDescription.my: Unit 3 bilik tidur, 2 bilik air di Bennington Residences, Setapak, terletak di kawasan perumahan yang established dengan keselamatan 24 jam. Susun atur tanpa perabot memberikan ruang kosong untuk keluarga menyesuaikan ruang hidup mengikut keperluan. Dua tempat letak kereta berbumbung disediakan. SK Mariam Convent dan Pusat Tuisyen Harapan Baru dalam kalangan pilihan pendidikan di sekitar kawasan ini. Klinik dan farmasi berbilang beroperasi berdekatan. Kedai mudah cerita seperti 7-Eleven dan KK Super Mart terdapat dalam kawasan kejiranan. Masjid tersedia dalam kawasan berhampiran untuk ibadat. Kawasan Setapak menawarkan pelbagai pilihan makan dari restoran cepat servis hingga ke gerai tempatan.
aiDescription.cn: 本3卧室2浴室单位位于Bennington Residences Setapak，坐落在成熟的住宅区，配备24小时安保。无装修布局为家庭提供了可个性化布置的空白空间。配备两个有盖停车位。周边地区的教育选择包括SK Mariam Convent和Pusat Tuisyen Harapan Baru。多间诊所和药房在附近营业，包括Klinik Dan Surgeri Setapak和CARiNG Pharmacy Prima Setapak。便利店如7-Eleven和KK Super Mart遍布社区。附近有清真寺供宗教礼拜使用。Setapak地区提供多种餐饮选择，从快餐店到本地食肆。

aiDescription.en: This 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom unit at Bennington Residences in Setapak comes unfurnished, offering families the flexibility to personalise their living space. Two covered car park spaces are included. The property sits within a well-established neighbourhood with multiple clinics and pharmacies within a <500m walk, providing accessible healthcare for children. SK Mariam Convent and tuition centres are within a <2km drive, making daily school runs manageable. A mosque is within a <2km drive, and several grocery options including Econsave Festival City are within a <5km drive. Multiple convenience stores are within a <500m walk, covering everyday needs. Dining options such as Restoran Long Fatt, KFC and pizza outlets are also nearby. Families should note that transit connectivity in the immediate area is limited, and driving is the primary mode of transport.

aiDescription.en: This 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom unit in EdgeWood Residences spans 1,096 sqft in the Setapak area. The fully furnished layout includes a living area, dining space and fitted kitchen with built-in cabinetry. Two covered parking spaces are allocated. Schools are well-represented nearby, with SK Mariam Convent within a 5-10 min walk and a tuition centre within walking distance, making this suitable for families with school-age children. Multiple clinics and pharmacies serve the area, including a paediatric clinic and two hospitals within easy reach. Grocery options include NSK Wangsa Maju and Econsave within a <2km drive, while convenience stores are scattered throughout the neighbourhood. A mosque is within a 5-10 min walk, and a childcare centre is also nearby. Lift service is available for residents.
aiDescription.my: Unit 3 bilik tidur, 2 bilik air di EdgeWood Residences seluas 1,096 kaki persegi di kawasan Setapak. Susun atur lengkap dengan ruang tamu, ruang makan dan dapur berkabinet. Dua tempat letak kereta berbumbung diperuntukkan. Sekolah diwakili dengan baik berdekatan, dengan SK Mariam Convent dalam 5-10 minit berjalan dan pusat tuisyen dalam jarak berjalan, sesuai untuk keluarga dengan anak sekolah. Klinik dan farmasi berganda termasuk klinik kanak-kanak dan dua hospital mudah dicapai. Pilihan runcit termasuk NSK Wangsa Maju dan Econsave dalam <2km pandu, kedai runcit tersebar di seluruh kawasan. Masjid dalam 5-10 minit berjalan, pusat penjagaan kanak-kanak berhampiran.
aiDescription.cn: EdgeWood Residences的这套3卧室2浴室单位面积1,096平方英尺，位于吉隆坡Setapak区。全屋配备齐全，设有客厅、餐厅和嵌入式橱柜厨房。配有两个有盖停车位。周边学校资源丰富，SK Mariam Convent在5-10分钟步行范围内，补习中心也在步行距离内，适合有学龄子女的家庭。多间诊所和药房服务该区域，包括儿科诊所和两所医院均在短途车程内。杂货店选择包括NSK Wangsa Maju和Econsave，车程不到2公里，便利店遍布社区。清真寺在5-10分钟步行范围内，托儿中心也在附近。

aiDescription.en: This 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom unit in Chambers offers 886 sqft of living space near the KL Sentral transport hub. The bare unit provides a blank canvas for setting up a home office or personal workspace. MRT, LRT and KTM stations are within a short walk, connecting directly to the KL city centre and beyond. Coffee shops and banks are within walking distance, along with diverse dining options ranging from Japanese restaurants to fast-food outlets. A clinic and pharmacy are nearby for convenience. One covered parking space is included. The absence of built-in furnishings means flexibility in layout planning.
aiDescription.my: Unit 2 bilik tidur, 2 bilik air di Chambers menawarkan 886 kaki persegi ruang hidup berhampiran hab pengangkutan KL Sentral. Unit tanpa perabot memberikan ruang kosong untuk menetapkan pejabat rumah atau ruang kerja. Stesen MRT, LRT dan KTM dalam jarak berjalan pendek, menghubungkan terus ke pusat Bandar KL dan seterusnya. Kedai kopi dan bank dalam jarak berjalan, bersama pilihan makan pelbagai dari restoran Jepun hingga makanan segera. Klinik dan farmasi berhampiran untuk kemudahan. Satu tempat letak kereta berbumbung disediakan. Ketiadaan perabot bina-dalam bermakna fleksibiliti dalam perancangan ruang.
aiDescription.cn: 这间位于Chambers的2卧室2浴室单位提供886平方英尺生活空间，靠近吉隆坡中环交通枢纽。空置单位为设置家庭办公室或个人工作空间提供了空白画布。地铁、轻轨和KTM车站在短途步行范围内，可直达吉隆坡市中心及更远地区。咖啡店和银行在步行距离内，餐饮选择多样，从日式餐厅到快餐店应有尽有。附近有诊所和药房便于日常需要。配备一个有盖停车位。无内置家具意味着布局规划更具灵活性。

content.description:
Modern Living at Savio @ Residensi Riana Dutamas
Looking for a stylish, hassle-free home in a prime location? This unit at Savio, Riana Dutamas offers the perfect blend of comfort and convenience—just bring your luggage!

Unit Highlights

Monthly Rent: RM3,000

Fully Furnished (Move-in ready)
2 Spacious Bedrooms & 2 Modern Bathrooms
Fully equipped with Air Conditioning in bedrooms.
Both bathrooms come with Water Heaters installed.
FREE High-Speed WiFi included in the rent and warer dispenser (Coway) — save your money and skip the contract hassle!

Why Choose Savio @ Riana Dutamas?

Unbeatable Accessibility
Located in the heart of North Kiara, you are minutes away from Mont Kiara, Publika, and Dutamas. With direct access to the DUKE Highway and Jalan Tuanku Abdul Halim, commuting to KL City Centre is a breeze.

Modern Facilities
Enjoy resort-style living with a spectacular infinity pool, a fully equipped gymnasium, landscaped gardens, and a multi-purpose hall—all within a secured, 24-hour guarded community.

Vibrant Lifestyle & Amenities
You are surrounded by premium grocery stores, trendy cafes, and international schools. Whether it’s a weekend brunch at Solaris Dutamas or shopping at 1 Mont Kiara, everything you need is just a short drive away.

Public Transport Link
The residence is strategically positioned near the Segambut KTM station, providing an alternative commute for those working in the CBD.

Everything is ready for you.
Why worry about buying furniture or setting up internet? Move into this fully-equipped home today.

content.description:
Studio unit suitable for young working adults.

The condo has multiple facilities that encourages chill & relax over 4 levels of facilities such as swimming pools, sky theatre, yoga / dancing room, gym, sauna, BBQ and cooking areas, various function rooms. Cafe, convenience store, beauty saloon and other commercials on the ground floor.

Various food outlets nearby including a NSK supermarket within 1KM too.

Easy access to major roads like Jln Ipoh and Jln Kuching to KL town centre and the other direction to the north.

Highways:

*Sultan Iskandar Highway (Lebuhraya Sultan Iskandar / Mahameru Highway): Links seamlessly to the KL City Centre, Bangsar, and the Federal Highway.

Please note that this is a studio unit and there is no wall separation between the bed, kitchenette, living and dining area. There is no exhaust fan to pull the smoke and fumes from the studio unit if you are cooking in an open fire stove; using microwave and steamer are fine though.

aiDescription.en: This 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom unit in MH Platinum 2 Residences spans 650 sqft in Setapak Jaya. The unfurnished layout offers families the flexibility to personalise their living space. Building facilities include a children's playground, swimming pool, BBQ area, basketball court and a well-maintained gym. Security is provided around the clock. Open University Malaysia and SK Mariam Convent are within a <5km drive, making this suitable for families with school-age children. Multiple clinics are within a <2km drive for healthcare access. Grocery options include NSK Wangsa Maju and Econsave Festival Mall within a <5km drive. Convenience stores and restaurants are scattered throughout the neighbourhood, with a clinic and several eateries within a <500m walk. One covered parking space is allocated per unit.
aiDescription.my: Unit 3 bilik tidur, 2 bilik air di MH Platinum 2 Residences seluas 650 kaki persegi di Setapak Jaya. Reka bentuk tanpa perabot memberikan fleksibiliti untuk keluarga mengubah suai ruang mengikut kehendak. Kemudahan bangunan termasuk taman permainan kanak-kanak, kolam renang, kawasan BBQ, gelanggang bola keranjang dan gim yang diselenggara dengan baik. Keselamatan 24 jam disediakan. Open University Malaysia dan SK Mariam Convent dalam <5km pandu. Pelbagai klinik dalam <2km pandu untuk akses kesihatan. Pilihan runcit termasuk NSK Wangsa Maju dan Econsave Festival Mall dalam <5km pandu. Kedai serbaneka dan restoran di seluruh kejiranan, dengan klinik dan beberapa kedai makan dalam <500m jalan. Satu tempat letak kereta berbumbung diperuntukkan setiap unit.
aiDescription.cn: MH Platinum 2 Residences这套3卧室2浴室单位位于Setapak Jaya，面积650平方英尺。单位未配备家具，布局开放灵活，方便家庭个性化布置。楼内设施包括儿童游乐场、游泳池、烧烤区、篮球场和保养良好的健身房。提供24小时保安。Open University Malaysia和SK Mariam Convent在<5公里车程内，适合有学龄儿童的家庭。多间诊所在<2公里车程内。杂货店包括NSK Wangsa Maju和Econsave Festival Mall，在<5公里车程内。便利店和餐厅遍布社区，诊所和多家餐饮店在<500米步行范围内。每个单位配有一个有盖停车位。

aiDescription.en: This 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom fully furnished unit spans 1,129 sqft in the Duta Park Residences development near KLCC. The layout includes a combined living and dining area with practical furnishings throughout, including built-in wardrobes in all bedrooms. Two covered parking spaces are included. Schools including Big Ben Education Group and Advance Tertiary College are within a <2km drive. A mosque is within a <500m walk, supporting daily religious needs. Grocery options such as Cold Storage KLCC and Village Grocer are within a <2km drive. Clinic access is available within a <500m walk. The residential neighbourhood includes established properties like Tropicana The Residence and Kirana Residences. Multiple convenience stores and pharmacies are available within a 5-10 min walk, and family dining options including mamak are within a <2km drive.
aiDescription.my: Unit 3 bilik tidur, 2 bilik air lengkap berperabot seluas 1,129 kaki persegi di Duta Park Residences berhampiran KLCC. Susun atur termasuk ruang tamu dan makan gabungan dengan peralatan praktikal sepanjang bangunan. Dua tempat letak kereta berbumbung disediakan. Sekolah seperti Big Ben Education Group dan Advance Tertiary College dalam <2km pandu. Masjid dalam <500m jalan. Pilihan runcit seperti Cold Storage KLCC dan Village Grocer dalam <2km pandu. Akses klinik dalam <500m jalan. Kawasan perumahan termasuk Tropicana The Residence dan Kirana Residences. Kedai serbaneka dan farmasi dalam 5-10 min jalan.
aiDescription.cn: 这套3卧室2浴室全装修单位位于Duta Park Residences，靠近吉隆坡市中心，面积为1,129平方英尺。布局包括开放式客厅和餐厅，配备实用家具，所有卧室均配有嵌入式衣柜。配备两个有盖停车位。Big Ben Education Group和Advance Tertiary College等学校在<2公里车程内。 Masjid在<500米步行范围内。Cold Storage KLCC和Village Grocer等杂货店在<2公里车程内。诊所在<500米步行范围内。住宅区包括Tropicana The Residence和Kirana Residences。多处便利店和药房在5-10分钟步行范围内，嘛嘛档等家庭餐厅在<2公里车程内。

aiDescription.en: Perfect starter family home in the thriving Setapak neighborhood! This well-maintained 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom unit spans 850 sqft with a smart, functional layout ideal for small families. The bright living area flows naturally into a cozy dining space, creating an inviting atmosphere for family bonding. Quality full furnishing includes comfortable sofa, dining set, and bedroom furniture that maximizes every inch of space. Two kindergarten schools are within 500-800m radius, making morning drop-offs a breeze, while Klinik 1Malaysia is just 800m away for peace of mind. The residential area features 24-hour security with controlled access, and the children's playground is perfect for weekend family activities. Two covered parking spaces ensure your vehicles stay protected from tropical weather. Daily essentials are steps away with Jaya Grocer (400m), multiple convenience stores (300m), and family-friendly restaurants (500m) nearby. The secure neighborhood with active community presence makes this an ideal sanctuary for your growing family.
aiDescription.my: Rumah keluarga pemula yang sempurna di kawasan Setapak yang sedang membangun! Unit 2 bilik tidur, 2 bilik air seluas 850 kaki persegi dengan reka bentuk функциональный yang sesuai untuk keluarga kecil. Dua tadika dalam radius 500-800m menjadikan hantar anak di pagi hari mudah. Kemudahanan keluarga termasuk游乐场 untuk aktiviti hujung minggu. Dua tempat letak kereta berbumbung melindungi kenderaan anda. Keperluan harian strategik dengan Jaya Grocer (400m) dan restoran mesra keluarga (500m) berdekatan.
aiDescription.cn: 正在发展的文良港社区中的完美首次家庭居所！精心维护的2卧室2浴室单位占地850平方英尺，智能功能布局非常适合小家庭。两个幼儿园距离500-800米，让早晨送学轻松便捷。儿童游乐场是周末亲子活动的理想场所。两个有盖停车位保护您的车辆免受热带天气影响。日常必需品近在咫尺， Jaya Grocer（400米）和家庭友好餐厅（500米）都在附近。24小时安保和封闭社区让这里成为成长中家庭的理想港湾。

content.name: Menara Putra, Kuala Lumpur
content.address: Jalan Thamboosamy, Chow Kit, 50350 Kuala Lumpur, Wilayah Persekutuan Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
content.description:
Menara Putra Apartment For rent 
Good location in KL
Freehold
One reason Menara Putra remains popular:

* Near PWTC / World Trade Centre KL
Sunway putra Mall 
• FREE GO KL BUS STOP 
* Near Chow Kit Monorail
* Near Sultan Ismail LRT
• Near KTMB PUTRA station
* Easy access to Jalan Raja Laut and Jalan Tun Razak, jln Tunku Abdul Rahman 
3 rooms
2 bathrooms
With BALCONY
* Balcony 1 attached to living room
* Balcony 2 access from master bedroom
* Compact enclosed kitchen
* Efficient rectangular layout with minimal wasted hallway space 

Menara Putra is a high rise apartment located off Jln Putra, Kuala Lumpur. One block which has 12 storeys. offers a single layout which has 889 sf built-up, with a Balcony 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms. Facilities, covered parking, open parking, mini market, barbecue area, children's playground and tight 24-hour security. In terms of amenities, Menara Putra is located within a short proximity from Wira Hotel, Bazaar Baru Chow Kit, The Legend, Putra World Trade Centre, PWTC Exhibition Hall, Damai Service Hospital, Damai Complex, Grand Pacific Hotel, SMK Maxwell, Pekeliling Plaza, Permata Plaza, Sentosa Medical Centre, Horizon School, Tungku Abdul Rahman Memorial and KL Metropilitan University College.There are also good networking available near Menara Putra, as the Putra KTM Station, CHoW KiT MONORAIL, Putra LRT Station, Sultan Ismail LRT Station and Titiwangsa LRT and MRT StationS are all located within a very short walking distance. There are also good Free GO KL bus Routes and Transport services available in this vicinity and this residence can also be easily connected via roads and highways namely Jalan Tunku Abdul Rahman, Jalan Chow Kit, Jalan Ipoh, Jaan Pahang, Jalan Tun Razak, Jalan Kuching, Mahameru Highway, Sentul Link, Duta - Ulu Kelang Highway, Jalan Duta - Sungai Buluh Highway and Ampang Elevated Highway.

aiDescription.en: Strategic urban residence for the career-focused professional! This unfurnished 889 sqft unit at Menara Putra offers a blank canvas to design your ideal modern workspace and living area. The prime Chow Kit location delivers exceptional connectivity – PWTC LRT Station is just minutes away, linking you to KL's business districts in under 30 minutes. The surrounding area is a professional's dream with OldTown White Coffee (350m), Starbucks (380m), and multiple banking services including Public Bank (500m) for all your financial needs. High-speed connectivity options are available in the building for uninterrupted remote work. One secure parking space is included, with easy access to major highways for car commuters. The incredible variety of dining options – from quick fast-food outlets like KFC and Burger Tar D'ross to quality restaurants – means every meal is covered. Multiple laundromats including Wah Li Drycleaners and Wash Studio are steps away, simplifying your daily routine. This is urban living designed for maximum productivity.
aiDescription.my: Kediaman strategik untuk profesional yang fokus pada kerjaya! Unit tidak berpenghuni seluas 889 kaki persegi di Menara Putra menawarkan kanvas kosong untuk mereka bentuk ruang kerja moden anda. Lokasi Chow Kit yang utama memberikan kesambungan luar biasa – PWTC LRT Station hanya beberapa minit, menghubungkan anda ke daerah perniagaan KL dalam 30 minit. OldTown White Coffee (350m), Starbucks (380m), dan perkhidmatan perbankan termasuk Public Bank (500m). Satu tempat letak kereta yang selamat disertakan.
aiDescription.cn: 专为职业精英打造的战略性地段住宅！Menara Putra这套889平方英尺的未装修单位提供空白画布，让您设计理想的现代工作和生活空间。优越的Chow Kit位置提供卓越的交通连接——PWTC轻轨站仅数分钟之遥，30分钟内连通吉隆坡商业区。周边配套设施完善，包括OldTown White Coffee（350米）、星巴克（380米）和多家银行服务。包含一个安全停车位，方便通往主要高速公路。

initialSeoData.title: 53 Rumah untuk Disewa di Sentul dari RM700 | SPEEDHOME
initialSeoData.metaDescription: Tanpa deposit tersedia. Semak 53 Rumah untuk disewa di Sentul. Dari RM700/bulan. Berhampiran Kampung Batu (PY). SPEEDHOME.
initialSeoData.faqTitle: Soalan Lazim Sewa Rumah di Sentul
initialSeoData.reasonChooseAreaAsNextHome: Sentul terletak di barat Kuala Lumpur dengan akses yang baik melalui LRT Ampang Line dan KTM Komuter, menjadikan perjalanan ke pusat banda senang tanpa perlu bergantung pada kereta. KL Performing Arts Centre (klpac) di kawasan ini menawarkan acara budaya dan seni secara tetap, manakala Sentul Park menyediakan ruang hijau untuk riadah keluarga. Penjaja dan kedai makan di sekitar Sentul Boulevard menawarkan pilihan makanan yang pelbagai dan harga berpatutan. Sentul juga terkenal dengan campuran hartanah yang luas — dari rumah teres lama hingga kondominium moden, memberi pilihan kepada penyewa dengan bajet dan keperluan yang berbeza. Keramaian di sini lebih tenang berbanding pusat KL, tetapi masih Connected dengan rangkaian pengangkutan yang cekap.
initialSeoData.advantageRentingInArea: Sewa di Sentul memberi kelebihan akses terus ke klpac untuk любителя budaya dan Sentul Park untuk keluarga yang suka aktiviti luar. Pengangkutan awam ke KL pusat melalui LRT Ampang Line dan KTM Komuter mengambil masa yang singkat, sesuai untuk professional yang bekerja di dalam kota. Pilihan hartanah di sini meliputi rumah teres, kondominium, studio dan bilik — memastikan ada sesuatu untuk setiap bajet. Anda juga boleh mencari unit tanpa deposit melalui SPEEDHOME jika ingin kurangkan kos pindahan pertama.

faq.question: Berapa kos sewa di Sentul?
faq.answer: Kos sewa di Sentul berbeza-beza bergantung pada jenis hartanah. Bilik sewa bermula sekitar RM500-RM800 sebulan, manakala kondominium dan apartmen biasanya dalam lingkungan RM1,000-RM2,500. Rumah teres dan kediaman landed pula boleh mencecah RM2,500-RM5,000 bergantung pada saiz dan lokasi spesifik.

faq.question: Apakah pengangkutan awam yang tersedia di Sentul?
faq.answer: Sentul dilayani oleh LRT Ampang Line dan KTM Komuter, menawarkan hubungan terus ke pusat Kuala Lumpur dan kawasan suburban lain. Stesen Sentul dan stesen berdekatan lain memudahkan akses tanpa kereta.

faq.question: Adakah rumah sewa tanpa deposit tersedia di Sentul?
faq.answer: Ya, beberapa hartanah di Sentul ditawarkan dengan pilihan tanpa deposit melalui SPEEDHOME. Ini membantu mengurangkan kos pindahan awal, terutama bagi penyewa yang pertama kali menyewa di kawasan ini.

faq.question: Apakah dokumen yang diperlukan untuk sewa di Sentul melalui SPEEDHOME?
faq.answer: Warganegara Malaysia perlu menyediakan MyKad, 2 slip gaji terkini dan penyata bank 3 bulan. Bukan warganegara memerlukan pasport, permit kerja atau visa sah serta surat pengesahan majikan. Proses kelulusan SPEEDHOME dilakukan secara digital dan biasanya mengambil masa 1-2 hari bekerja.

faq.question: Apakah jenis hartanah yang boleh disewa di Sentul?
faq.answer: Sentul menawarkan pelbagai jenis hartanah termasuk rumah teres, kondominium, apartmen, studio dan bilik. Kawasan ini sesuai untuk mahasiswa, professional dan keluarga yang mencari kediaman berdekatan dengan kemudahan dan pengangkutan.

faq.question: Apakah kemudahan yang terdapat di kawasan sekitar Sentul?
faq.answer: Penduduk Sentul mendapat manfaat daripada proximity kepada KL Performing Arts Centre (klpac) untuk acara budaya, Sentul Park untuk rekreasi, dan pelbagai pusat komersial untuk belanja harian. Kemudahan kesihatan dan sekolah juga terdapat dalam jarak yang mudah.

common.text_legal: SPEEDHOME is the safest and fastest leading rental property platform in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. SPEEDHOME is a safe platform for tenants and owners to communicate and deal with properties at zero deposit.
common.sunwayvelocitytwo,kualalumpur_ques_1: Why Kuala Lumpur is famous? Is it worth to stay?
common.ksunwayvelocitytwo,kualalumpur_ans_1: Kuala Lumpur is the ideal destination for both short visits or longer stays. It is Malaysia's capital city and one of Asia's most dynamics cities. This bustling metropolis is a melting pot of races and cultures and is home to a population of 1.6 million people. Transportation in KL is just great. The entire city can be explored by taxi, bus, train and metro. However, the main junctions in KL city centre are often extremely crowded during the peak before and after working hour.
common.kualalumpur_ques_1: Why Kuala Lumpur is famous? Is it worth to stay?
common.kualalumpur_ans_1: Kuala Lumpur is the ideal destination for both short visits or longer stays. It is Malaysia's capital city and one of Asia's most dynamics cities. This bustling metropolis is a melting pot of races and cultures and is home to a population of 1.6 million people. Transportation in KL is just great. The entire city can be explored by taxi, bus, train and metro. However, the main junctions in KL city centre are often extremely crowded during the peak before and after working hour.
common.kualalumpur_ques_2: How much do you need to live comfortably in Kuala Lumpur?
common.kualalumpur_ans_2: According to numbeo.com, the cost of living for a single person are around  RM 2083.04 without rent, wheres for a four-person family monthly cost is RM 7403.75 without rent.  Kuala Lumpur has the cost of living rank 325th out of 491 cities sin the word. Most of the expenses that might use while living in Kuala Lumpur are to the rental and transportation.
common.kualalumpur_ques_3: How do you get around in Kuala Lumpur?
common.kualalumpur_ans_3: Kuala Lumpur has a comprehensive rail transportation system, serviced by KL Monorail, Rapid Kl, Light Rail Transit (LRT) as well as the KTM commuter train. More parts of Kuala Lumpur are now connected by rails. The trains pass through the city and able to reach out of the commercial area. Buses are provided as well to reach out of the residential area. Taxi and Grab are probably the most convenient ways to travel from one place to another place in a short period.
common.kualalumpur_ques_4: Which district is under Kuala Lumpur?
common.kualalumpur_ans_4: There are 11 districts under Kuala Lumpur, the districts include Bukit Bintang, Titiwangsa, Setiawangsa, Wangsa Maju, Batu, Kepong, Segambut, Lembah Pantas, Seputeh, Bandar Tun Razak and Cheras.
common.kualalumpur_ques_5: What is the average rental in Kuala Lumpur?
common.kualalumpur_ans_5: By refering the house rental in speedhome, the average rental for one bedroom apartment near to the city centre is around RM2,200, whereas outside of city centre could be around RM 1,300.  For a three bedroom family home in city centre, the average rental is around RM4500 and outside of the city centre, it could be around RM 1,600.
common.cyberjaya_ans_1: The crime rate in Cyberjaya is low accoding to numbeo.com, it is safe to stay at Cyberjaya.
common.cyberjaya_ques_2: Is Cyberjaya a good place to stay?
common.cyberjaya_ans_2: Cyberjaya is surrounded by some famous areas such as Puchong, Putrajaya, Kajang, and Bangi. Besides that, from Cyberjaya to KLCC just need around 25 minutes. For those who work at KLIA area, choosing Cyberjaya to stay is also a good choice because from Cyberjaya to KLIA and KLIA 2 is just need around 25 minutes.
common.cyberjaya_ques_3: How far is Cyberjaya from KL? Is there any direct public transport between Cyberjaya and KL?
common.cyberjaya_ans_3: The road distance between Kuala Lumpur and Cyberjaya is 31.7 km. Yes, there is a direct bus and train from Cyberjaya to KL Sentral. The best way to get from Kuala Lumpur to Cyberjaya is to train which takes 18 minutes and cost around RM 23-40. Alternatively, you can take the bus, however, it takes time.
common.cyberjaya_ques_4: Are there any facilities in Cyberjaya?
common.cyberjaya_ans_4: There has a shopping mall in Cyberjaya which call D’Pulze Shopping Centre. There have Jaya Grocer which allow residents to buy some groceries in Cyberjaya. Besides that, you also can buy DIY equipment at ACE Hardware and get books at MPH and so much more. For the bank, in Cyberjaya, there have some bank branches there which are Maybank, HSBC, CIMB, Hong Leong Bank and Bank Rakyat.
common.cyberjaya_ans_5: Cost of living index in Cyberjaya will lower than Kuala Lumpur. Kuala Lumpur has 51.76% higher cost of living index than living in Cyberjaya. Besides that, rental prices in Cyberjaya is lower than rental prices in Kuala Lumpur.
common.cyberjaya_ques_6: What are the education facilities in Cyberjaya?
common.cyberjaya_ans_6: There are a primary school (Sekolah Kebangsaan Cyberjaya) and secondary public schools (Sekolah Menengah Cyberjaya) are built for the children of the general population in Cyberjaya. For tertiary education institutions that located in Cyberjaya including Multimedia University, Limkokwing University of Creative Technology, University Malaysia of Computer Science & Engineering, Heriot-Watt University, Cyberjaya University College of Medical Sciences, Cyber Putra College and Kirkby International College.
common.petalingjaya_ques_1: How far is Petaling Jaya from KL? What is the fastest way to get to KL from Petaling Jaya?
common.petalingjaya_ans_1: Total distance from Petaling Jaya to Kuala Lumpur is 10.81km. Petaling Jaya is surrounded by major highways such as the LDP, Federal Highway, Sprint and DUKE and all of these highways are offer easy access to Kuala Lumpur and other parts of Selangor. So, if you have a car, getting to KL from Petaling Jaya is easy. Besides that, in Petaling Jaya, there also have RAPID KL LRT station which can reach the city centre, Bangsar or even to Subang Jaya or Shah Alam. In Petaling Jaya also have MRT station where can reach from Kajang to Sungai Buloh.
common.petalingjaya_ques_2: Is Petaling Jaya safe? (What is the living cost in Petaling Jaya? )
common.petalingjaya_ans_2: Petaling Jaya had the highest crime in Selangor in 2016, due it is the thriving business community which probably by criminals are attracted to it. However, currently, most of the residential area has provided security service, CCTVs are situated at various locations around Petaling Jaya in 2017 as well.
common.petalingjaya_ques_3: What is the living cost in Petaling Jaya?
common.petalingjaya_ans_3: For a four-person family monthly costs maybe around RM7,677.00 without rent and for an individual the monthly living cost is around RM2144.00 following the internet research. Cost of living index in Petaling Jaya is 2.09% higher than in Kuala Lumpur. Although the cost of living index in Petaling Jaya is higher than Kuala Lumpur the rent cost in Petaling Jaya is lower than Kuala Lumpur. According to the research, the cost of living in Petaling Jaya is rank 313th out of 487 cities in the world.
common.petalingjaya_ques_4: Any shopping mall in Petaling Jaya?
common.petalingjaya_ans_4: There is plenty of shopping mall in Petaling Jaya. The most famous shopping mall in Petaling Jaya is 1 Utama shopping mall. Besides that, there are smaller neighbourhood malls such as Paradigm Mall, Atria Shopping Gallery and the newly opened Starling Mall in Damansara Uptown.
common.petalingjaya_ques_5: What are the recommended food in Petaling Jaya?
common.petalingjaya_ans_5: There are many good food in Petaling Jaya. For example Nasi KuKus Ilham. This restaurant is very special because it only serve one dish which is nasi kukus. Their nasi kukus special is because of their flavorful gulai, well marinated chicken and pineapple chunks. Besides that , in Petaling Jaya also have many good food such as Nasi Lemak Goreng Chef Fauzey, Sri Ganapathi Mess, Aunty Christina Laksa, Nasi Kandar Zainul and etc.
common.shahalam_ques_1: What is good in Shah Alam? (What to do in Shah Alam ? )
common.shahalam_ans_1: Shah Alam has several shopping malls, including SACC Mall, Plaza Shah Alam, AEON Mall and another hypermarket. Moreover, I-city is one of the attractive of Shah Alam and was developed on the outskirts, it hosts some entertainment centres to attract 1000 customers every weekend. If you like outdoor activities, you can visit Taman Botanica which is a good place for jog cycle and spending time to enjoy the green forest.
common.shahalam_ques_2: How far is Shah Alam from Kuala Lumpur? ( Is there a public transport between Kuala Lumpur and Shah Alam?)
common.shahalam_ans_2: Shah Alam is 18 km away from Kuala Lumpur. There have a direct bus and direct train working on the line from KL to Shah Alam. The direct bus which operated by Causeway Link will depart from Pasar Seni to Bulatan Melawati, Federal Highway. The time for the journey only takes approximately 39 min. Besides that, the direct train which operated by KTM commuter is working on the line from KL Sentral to Batu Tiga and the time taking approximately 43 min.
common.shahalam_ques_3: Is cost of living in Shah Alam is high compared to Petaling Jaya?
common.shahalam_ans_3: According to research, consumer prices which including rent prices in Shah Alam is lower than Petaling Jaya. The rent price in Petaling Jaya is higher than in Shah Alam. Besides that, the food prices and groceries price in Shah Alam is lower than Petaling Jaya.
common.shahalam_ques_4: Any education facilities in Shah Alam?
common.shahalam_ans_4: In Shah Alam, there are many schools and education institutions located in Shah Alam. For example, there have an International School name Tenby International School. Besides that, there also have Chinese Taipei School, Maz International School, REAL International School, Sekolah Seri Cahaya, Management & Science University and KDU University College. All are reachable in Shah Alam.
common.shahalam_ques_5: How is the connectivity of Shah Alam to other areas?
common.shahalam_ans_5: Shah Alam is a well plan places that has great accessibility to a few highway such as Federal Highway. Shah Alam Expressway that also known as the Kesas Highway is an alternative to the congested Federal Highway. It connects to a wide range of highway networks such as the Damansara-Puchong Expressway (LDP), North-South Expressway Central Link (Elite) North-South Expressway (NSE), Maju Expressway (MEX), New Klang Valley Expressway (NKVE), Kemuning-Shah Alam Highway (LKSA) and Kuala Lumpur – Karak Highway. It provides high accessibility which allow people from Shah Alam to travel to the city centre with short travelling time. Furthermore, it also the first expressway to have dedicated motorcycle lane that built for their safety.
common.cheras_ques_1: What is the quickest way get to Cheras by public transport?
common.cheras_ans_1: There are 2 ways to get from Cheras to Kuala Lumpur. The first way is by MRT station. The MRT line runs along Jalan Cheras in Kuala Lumpur, down the Cheras-Kajang expressway in Selangor, from Cochrane station to the Taman Koperasi Cuepacs station. This can help to avoid getting stuck in traffic congestion. Besides that, they do also have bus depart from Cheras to Pasar Seni, Kuala Lumpur.
common.cheras_ques_2: Is there any shopping mall and entertainment in Cheras?
common.cheras_ans_2: There is plenty of shopping mall in Cheras. For example, Cheras Leisure Mall, Eko Cheras Mall, AEON Cheras Selatan, Sunway Velocity, MyTown Shopping mall and Ikea Cheras. All shopping mall above can reach by public transport. In these shopping malls, there are having many food and drink outlets. Besides that, they also boast many of restaurant and cafe alongside a huge number of entertainment outlets example cinema ice rink and games zone. If you planning to buy some furniture, Ikea Cheras can help you solve the problem. There many furniture you can buy in Ikea Cheras.
common.cheras_ques_3: Is it convenient to get to Kuala Lumpur and Selangor from Cheras?
common.cheras_ans_3: Cheras sits in both in KL and Selangor. This meaning that living in Cheras is easy to get to Selangor. Besides that, if you are working in KL area, living in Cheras can help you easily get to working place.
common.cheras_ans_4: Cheras have many hospital. Cheras is a place that good in a range of public and private hospitals. There are multiple choices for the Cheras residents to choose for their healthcare. In Cheras there have small clinic such as Klinik Kesihatan Cheras. Besides that, in Cheras also have larger university hospital such as Universiti Kebangsaan Malaysia Medical Centre, larger hospital such as Columbia Asia Hospital, Pantai Hospital and etc. These hospital are provides healthcare for the residents.

It is conveniently accessible by shuttle bus and from Kelana Jaya LRT station. Kelana Jaya Lake Park is also popular which attracts the people from neighbouring area come to this park to relax and unwind after a long day at work as well as fishing at the largest lake in the park.
common.kelanjaya_ques_2: Where to stay in Kelana Jaya?
common.kelanjaya_ans_2: Kelana Jaya is a suburb in Petaling Jaya, It comprises mainly of landed properties with a few high rise as well. Most property of Kelana Jaya is located in SS3, SS4, SS5, SS6 and SS7 neighbourhoods.
common.kelanjaya_ques_3: What is the cheapest way to get from Kuala Lumpur Airport to Kelana Jaya?
common.kelanjaya_ans_3: Kelana Jaya is well served by public transport. The cheapest way to get from Kuala Lumpur Airport to Kelana Jaya is to bus which costs around RM12 and takes an hour. There is a direct bus departing from Kuala Lumpur International Airport 2 and arriving at Paradigm mall.
common.kelanjaya_ques_4: What are the eateries in Kelana Jaya?
common.kelanjaya_ans_4: As Kelana Jaya is dense area with high-rise building and commercial centre, many restaurants are opening within the area. Pig Out cafe which located at the Park Lane Commercial Centre, serve the prime belly cut of the pig that  roasted to perfection. Moreover, you can also enjoy at 7 types of grilled fish from iKna Kembung to stingrays which offer by Fend Ikan Bakar in SS5. If you want to try something different, you also can go to the night market at ss@ to enjoy stinky toufu.
common.kelanjaya_ques_5: Where are the commercial areas in Kelana Jaya?
common.kelanjaya_ans_5: There are several commercial centre in Kelana Jaya, such as , PJ21 Commercial centre, Kelana Business Centre, NZX Commercial Centre, Parklane Commercial Hub, Sunwaymas Commercial Centre Management Office and Da Vinci Sunway Mas Commercial Centre. Many large companies has chosen Kelana Jaya area to set up their office, such as Malaysia Airlines.
common.kepong_ans_1: The main access roads to Kepong are Damansara-Puchong Expressway, Jalan Kuching, MRR II and Jalan Ipoh. RapidKL bus and Metro bus provides transport here. Kepong is also served by KTM komuter line, where the station is located in the northern area of Kuala Lumpur along the Rawang - Seremban route. There are 4 stations will pass through Kepong for upcoming MRT 2 Sugai Buloh-Serdang-Putrajaya which will make Kepong more accessible upon it completion.
common.kepong_ques_2: Where is the residential area of Kepong?
common.kepong_ans_2: Kepong is one of the earliest townships in Kuala Lumpur’s history. The oldest area in Kepong like Bandar Menjalara, Taman Indah Perdana, Taman Kemacahaya, Taman Kepong, Kepong Baru, Desa Aman Puri, Desa Jaya, Jinjang Utara, Jinjang Selatan, Taman Bukit Maluri, Taman Bukit Desa and Taman Ehsan are home to thousands of low-,medium and high-end houses as well as traditional and heritage shops. With the development, Kepong now has become known as the place has beautiful and affordable homes. There are some apartments and condominums where suitable for working adult and students, such as Kepong Sentral Condominum, Casa Prima, Greenview Apartment, The Henge Residence and others.
common.kepong_ques_3: What are the amenities in Kepong ?
common.kepong_ans_3: Amenities in the vicinity include local and international schools, college, shopping malls, hypermarket, wet market, banks, eateries, reataurants and hospitals
common.kepong_ques_4: What is the average rental price in Kepong?
common.kepong_ans_4: According to the information in speedhome, for a whole unit with 3 bedroom with 1 to 2 bathrooms, the average rental is RM 1300 in Kepong.
common.kepong_ans_5: In Kepong there have a famous foodtruck name Authentic Thai Food Foodtruck. The foodtruck is selling Authentic Thai Food.If you are a Thaifood lover, this place you cannot miss. Besides that, there also have a famous Nasi Lemak which always long quene. Kepong still have many famous food restaurant or place such as Old School Style Ice Kacang, Salt-baked Chicken, Handmade Pan Mee and more.
common.kotadamansara_ques_1: Is Kota Damansara a good place to stay?
common.kotadamansara_ans_1: Kota Damansara is a great place to stay as it is a location far enough from the rush hours within the city centre. It is a peaceful location and very near to the leisure and shopping mall such as The Curve, Tesco and IKEA. Encorp Strand Mall and Sunway Giza Mall is just right in front of the Kota Damansara train station. For education facilities, SEGI University is perfectly located near the MRT as well, therefore many students can look for the house near to the uni such as Cova Vila, Cova Suit, De Rozelle, Sunsuria, D' Rimba Apartment and Sunway Nexis SOHO apartment.
common.kotadamansara_ques_2: Any public transport in Kota Damansara?
common.kotadamansara_ans_2: The MRT train has just launched in Kota Damansara which benefits the residents to access to another place. Buses are provided to the people to reach the Kelana Jaya LRT station from the residential area.
common.kotadamansara_ques_3: What are the recommended restaurant around Kota Damansara?
common.kotadamansara_ans_3: Fifth Palate is specializing in asian fusion, serving breakfast and bruch food. Beside that,  you can also try the Shell Out Seafood, they serve crabs, clams, crayfish and other creatures of the sea.  The seafood comes served with an array of fiery flavourful sauces or mild buttery ones that surprise the senses with every dip and dash.  After a heavy meal, a dessert course help digest the meal, you can enjoy cakes, cookies and intrcately decorated tower of toasts at Dreamz Bakery in Kota Damansara. People also enjoy the food at The Strand, Sunway Giza Mall and Cascades.
common.kotadamansara_ques_4: Any houses to rent in Kota Damansara?
common.kotadamansara_ans_4: Yes, there are several whole units to rent with the average rental price, RM 2200 at Emporis, Cova Suite and I Residence in Kota Damansara.
common.kotadamansara_ques_5: What is the living cost in Kota Damansara?
common.kotadamansara_ans_5: Th cost of living in is around RM 960 according to the costof.live. It will be affortable for a working adults with the RM 3000 salary per month.
common.oldklangroad_ques_1: What amenities and facilities are included in Old Klang Road?
common.oldklangroad_ans_1: Old Klang Road gives you easy access to shopping malls like Mid Valley City, Pearl Point shopping mall and OUG Plaza, not to mention access to several government schools, an international school, institutions of higher education, hotels shopping complexes, government institutions and a wide choice of eateries.
common.oldklangroad_ques_2: What is the road condition in Old Klang Road?
common.oldklangroad_ans_2: The area is densely populated and it acting as a major intersaction between cities.The Old Klang Road is directly link to a number of freeways including Federal Highway. SPRINT Highway, New Pantai Expressway (NPE), Damansara - Puchong Expressway (LDP) and KL- Seremban Expressway. Therefore, with the good connectivity, the traffic congestion is bound to happen.
common.oldklangroad_ques_3: How to get to old klang road in Kuala Lumpur by Bus, Metro or Train?
common.oldklangroad_ans_3: In term of public transport, Rapid KL buses are provided that move along this main road. The closest KTM station is at Mid Valley.
common.oldklangroad_ques_4: Where do people stay and what is the average rental price in Old Klang Road?
common.oldklangroad_ans_4: People in Old Klang Road usually stay at high-rise such as ViVo Residential Suites, Scott Garden, OUG Parklane, CitiZen, Riverville Residences and Southbank Residence, while for landed property, people usually stay at OUG, Happy Garden, Taman Lian Hoe, Taman Desa and Taman United.  The average the rental price for 3 bedroom unit is around RM 1800.
common.oldklangroad_ques_5: What are the recommended food in old klang road?
common.oldklangroad_ans_5: Old Klan Road as one of the oldest roads in Kuala Lumpur which link to the city center, there are a lot of restaurant along the way on Old Klang Road, for example BBQ Thai Street food, Coco Steamboat and Ishin Japanese Restaurant. You can also enjoy varety of street food despite the development here, such as Cao Cao Grilled Lamb & Wantan Mee stalls, Big Tree Fried Pan Mee, Asam Laksa in the OUG and Happy Garden Pasar Malam despite the rapid development here.
common.klang_ans_1: Klang claimed to be the 5th dangerous Asian city in 2016, it consists of a large number of criminal gangs reported to operating in Klang. The level of crime rates in Klang is high according to the numbeo.com.
common.klang_ques_2: What is the distance from Klang to Kuala Lumpur and the fastest way to travel between both places?
common.klang_ans_2: Distance from KL to Klang is 29km. There are 2 ways to get to KL from Klang. The first way is taking the bus and the second way is to take the train. Both public transport will take about 1 hour above to reach the destination. The fastest way is taking a taxi which cost RM 75- RM 95 and it only take around 35minutes.
common.klang_ques_3: What is the best in Klang?
common.klang_ans_3: Klang has inevitable shopping centres such as Aeon Bukit Tinggi, Aeon Bukit Raja, Centro Mall, Giant Hypermarket (at Bandar Bukit Tinggi and Klang Sentral) and GM Klang Wholesale City (Bandar Botanic). Klang is also home to Port Klang, the busiest port in the country. Because of the port, Klang is a booming industrial property hotspot. Furthermore, Klang consist of a few hospitals and medical centres that ensure the residents can receive better care such as Pantai Hospital Klang which offers a selection of room and services with high quality and personalised care to the Klang neighbourhood.
common.klang_ques_4: What are the public transport and accessibility in Klang?
common.klang_ans_4: Klang is served by three light rapid transit (LRT) lines, two commuter rail lines, one monorail line, one bus rapid transit line, one mass rapid transit (MRT) line and three airport rail links, two to the Kuala Lumpur International Airport and one to the Sultan Abdul Aziz Shah Airport. Klang is connected to the rest of the Klang Valley via the Federal Highway, the New Klang Valley Expressway, South Klang Valley Expressway, the North Klang Straits Bypass (New North Klang Straits Bypass) as well as the KESAS Highway.
common.klang_ques_5: What are the eateries around klang?
common.klang_ans_5: Klang is known for its Ba Kut Teh, Seng Huat Ba Kut Teh and Teluk Pulai Pottery Ba Kut Teh are the well-known restaurant in Klang and has many years of history. Instead of ba Kut Teh, you also can try the korean dishes of well known korean restaurant, Myung-Ga Korean Restaurant, they serve salmon fried fish ball, bibimbap, jajang myon as well as toppoki. The most signifixant Malay food spot in Klang is at “Emporium Makan”  which located at the opposite of Pasar Jawa.
common.klang_ques_6: Is there any medical center around Klang?
common.klang_ans_6: There are several medical center or hospital for the resident in Klang. For example, in Jalan Langat there is a big Hospital call Hospital Tengku Ampuan Rahimah (Klang General Hospital). Besides that, in Bandar Bukit Tinggi also have a Big Hospital named Manipal Hospitals Klang. In Klang there are almost 11 hospital. If you are living in Klang there are no any worried about Hospital because the Hospital is surounded all around Klang.

why_rent.h2: Kenapa Penyewa Pilih SPEEDHOME untuk Sewa Rumah di Malaysia
why_rent.p: SPEEDHOME membantu penyewa menyewa dengan lebih yakin melalui senarai yang telah disahkan, komunikasi terus dengan pemilik dan pilihan Zero Deposit pada hartanah yang layak.

1.p: Senarai yang layak boleh mengurangkan kos masuk awal. Semak terma pembayaran tepat pada setiap senarai sebelum membuat pertanyaan.

2.p: Tanya soalan, sahkan butiran dan aturkan langkah seterusnya terus melalui pengalaman penyenaraian.

3.p: Bandingkan sewa, kelengkapan, kemudahan, jenis bilik dan ketersediaan sebelum anda mula menyenarai pendek.

how_it_works.h2: Cara SPEEDHOME Berfungsi untuk Penyewa di Malaysia
how_it_works.p: Bergerak dari penemuan ke keputusan melalui aliran sewa ringkas yang direka untuk pemilihan lebih cepat dan komunikasi yang lebih jelas.

1.p: Gunakan penapis lokasi, bajet dan jenis hartanah untuk mempersempitkan rumah yang sesuai dengan keperluan anda.

2.p: Hubungi pemilik, tanya soalan dan aturkan lawatan fizikal atau maya apabila tersedia.

3.p: Selesaikan langkah seterusnya dengan lebih cepat setelah anda mengesahkan hartanah yang betul dan memahami keperluan masuk.

faqData.cyberjaya_ques_1: Berapakah harga sewa purata untuk rumah di Cyberjaya?
faqData.cyberjaya_ans_1: Rumah di Cyberjaya biasanya berharga antara RM2,000 hingga RM5,000 sebulan, bergantung pada saiz dan lokasi.
faqData.cyberjaya_ques_2: Adakah rumah di Cyberjaya lengkap berperabot?
faqData.cyberjaya_ans_2: Sesetengah rumah lengkap berperabot, manakala yang lain separuh berperabot atau kosong.
faqData.cyberjaya_ques_3: Adakah Cyberjaya tempat yang baik untuk menyewa rumah?
faqData.cyberjaya_ans_3: Ya, ia adalah kawasan yang maju dengan infrastruktur moden, sesuai untuk profesional dan keluarga.
faqData.cyberjaya_ques_4: Adakah terdapat rumah sewa yang mesra haiwan peliharaan?
faqData.cyberjaya_ans_4: Sesetengah tuan rumah membenarkan haiwan peliharaan—semak butiran penyenaraian untuk polisi tertentu.
faqData.cyberjaya_ques_5: Adakah rumah di Cyberjaya menyediakan tempat letak kereta?
faqData.cyberjaya_ans_5: Ya, kebanyakan rumah menyediakan tempat letak kereta khas.
faqData.cyberjaya_ans_6: Lazimnya, penyewa membayar utiliti secara berasingan melainkan dinyatakan dalam perjanjian sewa.
faqData.cyberjaya_ques_7: Bagaimana saya boleh mencari rumah sewa tanpa deposit?
faqData.cyberjaya_ans_7: SPEEDHOME menawarkan pilihan sewa tanpa deposit untuk hartanah terpilih.
faqData.cyberjaya_ques_8: Adakah Cyberjaya tempat yang selamat untuk menyewa rumah?
faqData.cyberjaya_ans_8: Ya, ia adalah bandar yang selamat dengan banyak komuniti berpagar.
faqData.cyberjaya_ques_9: Bolehkah saya menyewa rumah untuk tempoh pendek?
faqData.cyberjaya_ans_9: Sesetengah tuan rumah menawarkan sewa jangka pendek, tetapi kebanyakannya lebih suka sewa jangka panjang.
faqData.cyberjaya_ques_10: Bagaimana cara menyewa rumah di Cyberjaya?
faqData.cyberjaya_ans_10: Layari penyenaraian di SPEEDHOME, minta lawatan, dan hantar permohonan sewa anda.

faqData.cyberjaya_studio_ans_1: Sewa studio bermula dari sekitar RM900 sebulan.
faqData.cyberjaya_studio_ques_2: Adakah studio di Cyberjaya lengkap berperabot?
faqData.cyberjaya_studio_ans_2: Kebanyakan studio lengkap berperabot, tetapi sesetengahnya separuh berperabot.
faqData.cyberjaya_studio_ans_3: Ya, Cyberjaya mempunyai banyak universiti, menjadikannya lokasi yang sesuai untuk pelajar.
faqData.cyberjaya_studio_ans_4: Sesetengah sewa termasuk Wi-Fi, manakala yang lain memerlukan penyewa menyediakan sendiri.
faqData.cyberjaya_studio_ques_5: Adakah tempat letak kereta disediakan untuk studio?
faqData.cyberjaya_studio_ans_5: Sesetengah studio menyediakan tempat letak kereta, tetapi yang lain mungkin mengenakan bayaran tambahan.
faqData.cyberjaya_studio_ques_6: Bolehkah saya mencari studio yang mesra haiwan peliharaan di Cyberjaya?
faqData.cyberjaya_studio_ans_6: Sesetengah tuan rumah membenarkan haiwan peliharaan, tetapi banyak studio mempunyai sekatan.
faqData.cyberjaya_studio_ques_7: Adakah utiliti termasuk dalam sewa studio?
faqData.cyberjaya_studio_ans_7: Utiliti biasanya dikenakan secara berasingan melainkan dinyatakan dalam penyenaraian.
faqData.cyberjaya_studio_ques_8: Adakah Cyberjaya kawasan yang selamat untuk menyewa studio?
faqData.cyberjaya_studio_ans_8: Ya, Cyberjaya adalah bandar terancang dengan langkah keselamatan yang baik.
faqData.cyberjaya_studio_ques_9: Bolehkah saya menyewa studio untuk tempoh pendek?
faqData.cyberjaya_studio_ans_9: Sesetengah tuan rumah menawarkan tempoh sewa yang fleksibel, tetapi kebanyakannya lebih suka sewa jangka panjang.
faqData.cyberjaya_studio_ques_10: Bagaimana cara menyewa studio di Cyberjaya?
faqData.cyberjaya_studio_ans_10: Layari penyenaraian, jadualkan lawatan, dan mohon melalui SPEEDHOME.
faqData.cyberjaya_apartment_ques_1: Berapakah kos untuk menyewa pangsapuri di Cyberjaya?
faqData.cyberjaya_apartment_ans_1: Harga bermula dari RM1,500 sebulan untuk pangsapuri standard.
faqData.cyberjaya_apartment_ques_2: Adakah pangsapuri di Cyberjaya lengkap berperabot?
faqData.cyberjaya_apartment_ans_2: Sesetengah pangsapuri lengkap berperabot, manakala yang lain menawarkan pilihan separuh berperabot.
faqData.cyberjaya_apartment_ques_3: Adakah pangsapuri di Cyberjaya sesuai untuk keluarga?
faqData.cyberjaya_apartment_ans_3: Ya, banyak pangsapuri menawarkan kemudahan mesra keluarga.
faqData.cyberjaya_apartment_ans_4: Kebanyakan pangsapuri mempunyai keselamatan 24/7 dan akses berpagar.
faqData.cyberjaya_apartment_ques_5: Adakah tempat letak kereta termasuk dalam sewa?
faqData.cyberjaya_apartment_ans_5: Banyak pangsapuri menawarkan tempat letak kereta percuma, tetapi sesetengahnya mengenakan bayaran tambahan.
faqData.cyberjaya_apartment_ques_6: Adakah pangsapuri di Cyberjaya mesra haiwan peliharaan?
faqData.cyberjaya_apartment_ans_6: Sesetengah membenarkan haiwan peliharaan, manakala yang lain mempunyai sekatan—semak butiran penyenaraian.
faqData.cyberjaya_apartment_ques_7: Adakah Wi-Fi termasuk dalam sewa pangsapuri?
faqData.cyberjaya_apartment_ans_7: Biasanya, penyewa perlu menyediakan perkhidmatan internet sendiri.
faqData.cyberjaya_apartment_ques_8: Bolehkah saya mencari pangsapuri tanpa deposit?
faqData.cyberjaya_apartment_ans_8: Ya, pangsapuri terpilih di SPEEDHOME menawarkan pilihan tanpa deposit.

faqData.cyberjaya_apartment_ques_10: Bagaimana cara menyewa pangsapuri di Cyberjaya?
faqData.cyberjaya_apartment_ans_10: Cari penyenaraian, minta lawatan, dan mohon melalui SPEEDHOME.
faqData.cyberjaya_condo_ques_1: Berapakah harga sewa purata untuk kondominium di Cyberjaya?
faqData.cyberjaya_condo_ans_2: Sesetengah kondominium lengkap berperabot, manakala yang lain separuh berperabot.
faqData.cyberjaya_condo_ques_3: Adakah kondominium di Cyberjaya mempunyai kolam renang dan gim?
faqData.cyberjaya_condo_ans_3: Ya, kebanyakan kondominium menawarkan kolam renang, gim, dan kemudahan lain.
faqData.cyberjaya_condo_ans_4: Ya, kondominium menyediakan persekitaran hidup yang selamat dan selesa untuk keluarga.
faqData.cyberjaya_condo_ques_5: Adakah kondominium termasuk tempat letak kereta?
faqData.cyberjaya_condo_ans_5: Kebanyakan kondominium menyediakan sekurang-kurangnya satu tempat letak kereta.

faqData.kualalumpur_room_ques_1: Bagaimana cara terpantas untuk cari bilik atau rumah sewa di KL?
faqData.kualalumpur_room_ans_1: Cara terpantas dan paling efisien adalah menggunakan platform carian sewa seperti Speedhome. Anda boleh menaip kata kunci umum seperti 'bilik sewa kuala lumpur' atau lokasi spesifik seperti 'rumah sewa Bandar Sri Permaisuri' untuk melihat ratusan pilihan yang disahkan. Gunakan fungsi penapis untuk menyusun mengikut harga, jenis hartanah, dan sama ada anda mahu menyewa dengan Zero Deposit.
faqData.kualalumpur_room_ques_2: Saya mencari rumah sewa di Bandar Sri Permaisuri. Adakah ia kawasan yang bagus?
faqData.kualalumpur_room_ans_2: Ya, Bandar Sri Permaisuri adalah pilihan yang sangat popular, terutamanya untuk keluarga dan golongan profesional. Kawasan ini strategik kerana mempunyai beberapa stesen LRT, akses mudah ke pusat bandar, dan berdekatan dengan HUKM. Ia juga terkenal dengan kemudahan rekreasi seperti Taman Tasik Permaisuri, menjadikannya lokasi yang seimbang untuk kehidupan dan kerja.
faqData.kualalumpur_room_ques_3: Adakah berbaloi menyewa bilik di pusat bandar seperti Kg. Baru atau Chow Kit?
faqData.kualalumpur_room_ans_3: Sangat berbaloi jika anda bekerja di pusat bandar KL. Kelebihan utama mencari bilik sewa Kg. Baru KL atau bilik sewa Chow Kit adalah jarak berjalan kaki ke pejabat, akses terus ke rangkaian LRT/Monorel, dan pelbagai pilihan makanan pada harga berpatutan. Ia sesuai untuk mereka yang mahu menjimatkan masa dan kos pengangkutan harian.
faqData.kualalumpur_room_ques_4: Berapakah bajet yang realistik untuk sewa bilik atau rumah di Kuala Lumpur?
faqData.kualalumpur_room_ans_4: Bajet sewa di KL sangat bervariasi mengikut lokasi: Bilik Sewa: Di kawasan pinggir bandar seperti Pandan Jaya atau Bandar Tun Razak, anda boleh jangkakan bajet antara RM400 - RM700. Di pusat bandar, harganya mungkin bermula dari RM600 - RM900+. Rumah Sewa (Apartmen/Kondo): Di kawasan seperti Bandar Sri Permaisuri, sewa bulanan adalah sekitar RM1,400 - RM2,500. Di pusat KL, harga boleh mencecah RM2,000 ke atas.
faqData.kualalumpur_room_ques_5: Bolehkah saya menyewa di KL tanpa pening kepala dengan ejen dan deposit tinggi?
faqData.kualalumpur_room_ans_5: Sudah tentu. Platform seperti Speedhome membolehkan anda berhubung terus dengan tuan rumah, menjimatkan masa dan mengelakkan salah faham. Paling penting, anda boleh mencari ribuan penyenaraian Zero Deposit, membolehkan anda menyewa rumah sewa di Kuala Lumpur tanpa perlu membayar deposit 2+1 yang tinggi.

faqData.kualalumpur_terrace_ques_1: Apakah julat harga sewa untuk rumah teres di KL?
faqData.kualalumpur_terrace_ans_1: Harga bermula dari RM 2,000 untuk unit asas dan mencecah RM 6,000 untuk rumah yang lebih besar.
faqData.kualalumpur_terrace_ques_2: Adakah rumah teres di Kuala Lumpur sesuai untuk keluarga?
faqData.kualalumpur_terrace_ans_2: Ya, mereka menawarkan ruang yang luas dan sesuai untuk keluarga dengan anak-anak.
faqData.kualalumpur_terrace_ques_3: Kawasan manakah di KL yang mempunyai rumah teres terbaik untuk disewa?
faqData.kualalumpur_terrace_ans_3: Desa Park City, Taman Tun Dr. Ismail (TTDI), dan Bangsar adalah pilihan utama.
faqData.kualalumpur_terrace_ques_4: Adakah rumah teres menyediakan tempat letak kereta?
faqData.kualalumpur_terrace_ans_4: Ya, kebanyakan menyediakan satu atau dua tempat letak kereta peribadi.
faqData.kualalumpur_terrace_ques_5: Adakah utiliti termasuk dalam sewaan rumah teres?
faqData.kualalumpur_terrace_ans_5: Penyewa biasanya membayar utiliti secara berasingan.
faqData.kualalumpur_terrace_ques_6: Adakah rumah teres di KL mempunyai keselamatan berkawal?
faqData.kualalumpur_terrace_ans_6: Sesetengah terletak dalam komuniti berkawal, manakala yang lain berada di kawasan perumahan terbuka.
faqData.kualalumpur_terrace_ques_7: Adakah terdapat rumah teres mesra haiwan peliharaan di KL?
faqData.kualalumpur_terrace_ans_7: Ya, banyak tuan rumah membenarkan haiwan peliharaan, terutamanya di hartanah berlandskap.
faqData.kualalumpur_terrace_ques_8: Bolehkah saya menyewa rumah teres untuk tempoh pendek?
faqData.kualalumpur_terrace_ans_8: Kebanyakan memerlukan pajakan satu tahun, tetapi sesetengah tuan rumah menawarkan sewaan jangka pendek.
faqData.kualalumpur_terrace_ques_9: Adakah rumah teres mempunyai halaman belakang atau taman?
faqData.kualalumpur_terrace_ans_9: Sesetengah unit mempunyai taman kecil atau ruang luar.

faqData.kualalumpur_terrace_ans_10: Banyak berhampiran stesen MRT dan LRT, menyediakan akses mudah ke bandar.
faqData.damansara_ques_1: Apakah jenis hartanah sewaan yang terdapat di Damansara?
faqData.damansara_ans_1: Damansara menawarkan pelbagai pilihan sewaan, termasuk apartmen, kondominium, rumah teres, dan unit studio.

faqData.damansara_ans_2: Ya, beberapa tuan rumah di Damansara membenarkan penyewa membawa haiwan peliharaan. Adalah dinasihatkan untuk mengesahkan polisi haiwan peliharaan sebelum menyewa.

faqData.damansara_ans_5: Ya, banyak hartanah datang dengan perabot lengkap atau separa lengkap, sesuai dengan keperluan penyewa.

faqData.damansara_ans_6: Damansara popular di kalangan ekspatriat kerana perumahan mewah dan kedekatannya dengan sekolah antarabangsa.

faqData.damansara_ans_10: Banyak platform sewaan menawarkan lawatan maya; anda boleh memintanya melalui senarai hartanah atau menghubungi tuan rumah secara langsung.

faqData.property_faq_rental_q1: Berapakah sewa bulanan untuk {{propertyType}} ini di {{locationName}}?
faqData.property_faq_rental_a1: Sewa bulanan untuk {{propertyType}} ini di {{locationName}} ialah RM{{price}}. Ini termasuk {{inclusions}}.
faqData.property_faq_facilities_a: {{locationName}} menawarkan ketersambungan dan kemudahan yang sangat baik termasuk {{amenities}}. Kawasan ini dilayani dengan baik oleh pengangkutan awam dan mempunyai akses mudah ke pusat membeli-belah, restoran, dan kemudahan rekreasi.
faqData.property_faq_viewing_q: Adakah lawatan maya tersedia untuk {{propertyType}} ini?
faqData.property_faq_viewing_a: Ya, lawatan maya tersedia untuk {{propertyType}} ini. Anda boleh menjadualkan lawatan maya melalui platform SPEEDHOME untuk melihat hartanah dari jauh sebelum membuat keputusan.
faqData.property_faq_documents_q: Apakah dokumen yang diperlukan untuk menyewa {{propertyType}} ini?
faqData.property_faq_documents_a: Untuk menyewa {{propertyType}} ini, anda biasanya memerlukan: IC/pasport yang sah, surat pekerjaan, slip gaji (3 bulan terkini), penyata bank, dan bil utiliti. Homerunner SPEEDHOME akan membimbing anda melalui proses dokumentasi.
faqData.property_faq_fees_q: Adakah terdapat sebarang bayaran tambahan untuk menyewa di {{locationName}}?
faqData.property_faq_fees_a: Yuran sewa biasanya termasuk deposit keselamatan (biasanya 2 bulan sewa), deposit utiliti, dan yuran setem. SPEEDHOME menawarkan pilihan tanpa deposit untuk penyewa yang layak. Pasukan kami akan memberikan pecahan terperinci semua kos yang terlibat.
faqData.property_faq_room_inclusions_q: Apakah yang disertakan dalam sewaan bilik di {{locationName}}?
faqData.property_faq_room_inclusions_a: Sewaan bilik termasuk {{inclusions}}. Kemudahan berkongsi biasanya termasuk dapur, ruang tamu, dan bilik air bersama. Kemasukan khusus akan diperincikan dalam penyenaraian.
faqData.property_faq_property_facilities_q: Apakah kemudahan yang tersedia dalam hartanah ini?
faqData.property_faq_property_facilities_a: Hartanah ini menawarkan pelbagai kemudahan termasuk {{facilities}}. Kemudahan ini meningkatkan pengalaman hidup anda dan memberikan kemudahan untuk penduduk.
